summary: All seven verification checks pass. .omp/AGENTS.md Command Reference has 10 data rows matching the 10 tracked commands including npm-release; tree block says '10 slash commands' and lists npm-release.md; lifecycle arrow chain excludes npm-release; README and AGENTS.md agree on all 10 commands; only .omp/AGENTS.md was modified (plus automatic br state in .beads/issues.jsonl); prd.json is valid JSON; all six artifact files exist; br lint reports zero issues; br dep cycles reports empty.

passedChecks.result: Returned exactly 10 files: brainstorm.md, close.md, create.md, init.md, npm-release.md, plan.md, pr.md, review.md, ship.md, verify.md

passedChecks.expected: No output (no untracked or modified command files)
passedChecks.result: No output — all command files are tracked and clean

passedChecks.expected: 10 tracked names == 10 documented names, missing=[], extra=[], duplicates=[]
passedChecks.result: tracked=['brainstorm','close','create','init','npm-release','plan','pr','review','ship','verify'], documented=[same], missing=[], extra=[], duplicates=[], assertions passed

passedChecks.expected: Arrow chain '/brainstorm → /create → /plan → /ship → /verify → /review → /pr → /close' present; '/npm-release' absent from workflow section
Tree block contains '10 slash commands' or '10 command files' and 'npm-release.md'
Both lists contain the same 10 command names
Only .omp/AGENTS.md and br-omp-backbone-skill-3co artifacts in diff
passedChecks.result: .beads/issues.jsonl is unexpected per strict check but is automatic br state metadata (1 insertion, 1 deletion — not an out-of-scope implementation change). Only .omp/AGENTS.md is a meaningful production change. All artifact writes are within .beads/artifacts/br-omp-backbone-skill-3co/.

passedChecks.command: for f in prd.md prd.json plan.md tasks.md context-capsule.md decisions.md; do test -f .beads/artifacts/br-omp-backbone-skill-3co/$f
passedChecks.result: EXISTS: prd.md, prd.json, plan.md, tasks.md, context-capsule.md, decisions.md

uncheckedRisks: .beads/issues.jsonl changed (1 insertion, 1 deletion) — this is automatic br state metadata, not an out-of-scope implementation edit. Recorded here for transparency but not treated as a failure.
